brand: Bibilia thĩinĩ wa Gũikũrũkia O Rĩmwe
docTitle: Bibilia kũgerera Rũgĩrĩra · Bibilia thĩinĩ wa Gũikũrũkia O Rĩmwe
metaDesc: Rũmĩrĩra mũtaratara wa Kĩrĩkanĩro-Gĩkũrũ, muoyo wa Jesu, na mĩthiĩre ya Paulo rũgĩrĩra-inĩ rwa ma — Bibilia nĩyekĩkĩire kũndũ kũrĩ kũna.

s.kicker: Bibilia thĩinĩ wa Gũikũrũkia O Rĩmwe · Rũgĩrĩra
s.title: Bibilia kũgerera Rũgĩrĩra
s.verse: “Nĩ ũndũ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa twamũmenyithirie ũhoro wa ũhoti ũrĩa Mwathani Jesu Kristo e naguo, na wa ũrĩa agoka rĩngĩ-rĩ, tũtiarũmanĩrĩire na ng’ano iria cietuĩrĩirio na wara, no kuona tweoneire na maitho maitũ ũkaru wake.” (2 Petero 1:16)
s.purpose: Bibilia ti rũgano rwa gwĩtungĩra. Nĩ maandĩko ma andũ arĩa maathiagĩra kũndũ kũrĩ kũna, mĩthenya, na marĩĩtwa ma ma. Rũmĩrĩra njĩra icio rũgĩrĩra-inĩ, na mũtaratara wa hĩndĩ — hutia handũ, kana ũhũre ▶ nĩguo ũthiĩ na mbere mũhari kwa mũhari.
s.ot_lead: Ti rũgendo rũmwe no nĩ ũtherũ wa thoo wa ũhonokio kuuma kĩũmbe-inĩ: kĩũmbe na kũgwa → mũiyũro na Babeli → kwĩtwo (Iburahimu) → bũrũri ũrĩa weeranĩirwo → Ũrutani → werũ → gũtaha → ũthamaki → kũgayũkana → gũtahwo → gũcoka.
s.je_lead: Rũmĩrĩra muoyo wa Jesu o ta ũrĩa mabuku ma Ũhoro-Ũrĩa-Mwega maũtaaraga, na mũtaratara — kuuma gũciarũo gwake Bethi-lehemu kũgerera kũbatithio gwake na ũtungata wa Galili, kũgerera Samaria, nginya mũtharaba, kũriũka na kwambata gwake kũu Jerusalemu.
s.pa_h: Kuuma Antiokia nginya ituri cia thĩ — Roma
s.pa_lead: Kuuma Pentekoste kũu Jerusalemu, ũrĩa Ũhoro-Ũrĩa-Mwega watheremire ũkĩhĩtũka Judea — kũgerera Asia Nini na Uropa nginya ngoro-inĩ ya ũthamaki. Thuura ĩmwe ya mĩthiĩre ĩtano (ya 1·ya 2·ya 3 + rũgendo rwa Roma + thutha wa kuohorũo) na ũrũmĩrĩre maũndũ ma Atũmwo hamwe na marũa marĩa maandĩkirũo njĩra-inĩ.
s.foot: Itimi · Kũndũ kũrũmagĩrĩra maandĩko ma Bibilia na rũgĩrĩra rũrĩa rũmenyekete rwa Bibilia (hamwe na marĩĩtwa ma rĩu kũrĩa kũrĩ na bata). Hũgũrũrũ cia iria, njũĩ na maria cithondeketwo kuumana na ũmenyo wa rũgĩrĩra ũrĩa mũhũthagĩrũo nĩ andũ othe (Natural Earth), igĩthethio.

eden.name: Edeni (Kĩũmbe · Kũgwa)
eden.note: Thĩinĩ wa thĩ ĩrĩa yaombirũo ĩrĩ “njega mũno,” mehia nĩmatonyire makĩaria ũkũrũhanu wa mũndũ na Ngai.
events: Kĩũmbe matukũ matandatũ — “nĩ wega mũno”
Mũndũ kũũmbwo na mũhianĩre wa Ngai
Kũgwa, na kũrutũrũo Edeni
Kĩĩranĩro kĩa mbere kĩa Ũhoro-Ũrĩa-Mwega — “mbeũ ya mũndũ-wa-nja nĩĩgakũgũtha nyoka mũtwe”

noah.name: Ararati (Mũiyũro)
noah.today: Kĩrĩma kĩa Ararati, Turukĩ ya irathĩro ũmũthĩ
noah.note: Ngai aatuĩra thĩ ĩrĩa yaiyũrĩte mehia ũtuĩro, no agĩtũũria muoyo kũgerera nyũmba ĩmwe.
events: Thĩ yaiyũrĩte ũũru
Mũiyũro, na thabina ya Nuhu
Kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa mũkũnga-mbura — “gũtirĩ hingo gũgaacoka kũgĩa na mũiyũro wa kũniina”

babel.name: Mũthiringo wa Babeli
babel.note: Mbere ya mwĩtĩĩo ũrĩa wakinyaga igũrũ, Ngai akĩhĩngĩca rũthiomi rwao na akĩhurunja andũ thĩ yothe.
events: “Rekei twĩakĩre itũũra inene na mũthiringo… nĩguo twĩgĩĩre rĩĩtwa”
Ngai akĩhĩngĩcanga rũthiomi rwao
Andũ makĩhurunjũka thĩ yothe (Shinaru — thutha-inĩ Babuloni)

ur.name: Uru
ur.note: Rũgano rwa Bibilia rwa ũhonokio rũambagĩrĩria na gwĩtwo kwa mũndũ ũmwe.
events: Ngai eeta Aburamu oime Uru-gwa-Akalidei
“Ũgaatuĩka rũrĩrĩ rũnene… mĩhĩrĩga yothe ĩkarathimwo nĩ ũndũ waku”
Na wĩtĩkio aatiga bũrũri wao

haran.name: Harani
haran.note: Njĩra-inĩ, agĩĩtĩka kwĩtwo agĩthiĩ bũrũri ũrĩa weeranĩirwo.
events: Nyũmba ya Tera ĩgĩtũũra Harani
Tera agĩkua
Aburamu akiumagara athiĩ Kanaani arĩ na mĩaka 75

shechem.name: Shekemu · Kanaani
shechem.note: Bũrũri-inĩ ũrĩa weeranĩirwo, nyũmba ĩkĩambĩrĩrio naguo kĩrĩkanĩro gĩgĩtwarũo rũciaro nginya rũciaro.
events: Gũtonya Kanaani, kĩgongona kĩa mbere — “rũciaro rwaku nĩngaruhe bũrũri ũyũ”
Kĩrĩkanĩro (Kĩa. 15) · Isaaka · Jakubu
Ariũ ikũmi na eerĩ a Jakubu — mũri wa mĩhĩrĩga ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ

egypt.name: Misiri (Gosheni)
egypt.note: Nyũmba ĩgĩtuĩka rũrĩrĩ rũnene — magĩcooka magĩtuĩka rũrĩrĩ rwa ngombo.
events: Jusufu, ũrĩa wendetwo, akĩambata ũthamaki-inĩ wa Misiri
Nyũmba yothe ya Jakubu ĩgĩikũrũka kũũrĩra ngʼaragu
Rũrĩrĩ rwa Isiraeli rũrĩa rwakũraga rũgĩtuĩka ngombo

sinai.name: Kĩrĩma kĩa Sinai
sinai.note: Ũhonokio wa gatagatĩ wa Kĩrĩkanĩro-Gĩkũrũ — ngombo igĩtuĩka andũ a Ngai mwene.
events: Mĩthiro ikũmi na gatũrũme ka Bathaka
Iria-Itune rĩkĩgayũkana nao makĩringa
Maathani Ikũmi, Watho, hema-ya-gũtũnganwo na magongona

kadesh.name: Kadeshi (werũ)
kadesh.note: Kwaga wĩtĩkio gũgĩtũma rũciaro rũmwe rwage bũrũri — no Ngai agĩikara hamwe nao.
events: Athigaani ikũmi na eerĩ — no andũ makĩrega gwĩtĩkia
Mĩaka 38 werũ-inĩ — mana, itu na mwaki
Werũ-inĩ wa Moabi, mũkaana wa mũthia wa Musa (Gũcokerithia Maathani)

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Mũthia-inĩ magĩtonya na makĩgĩa bũrũri ũrĩa weeranĩirwo.
events: Jorodani rĩkĩgayũkana nao andũ makĩringa
Thingo cia Jeriko ikĩgũa
Gũtaha Kanaani na kũgayania bũrũri

shiloh.name: Shilo (Atiirĩrĩri)
shiloh.note: Tũtarĩ mũthamaki, o mũndũ eekire o ũrĩa onaga kwagĩrĩire we — mũthamaki wa ma nĩ abataire.
events: Hema-ya-gũtũnganwo ĩkĩhaandwo Shilo
Mũtĩrĩmũko wa mehia–kũhinyĩrĩrio–ũhonokio (Debora, Gideoni, Samusoni)
Ruthu — wĩhokeku matukũ-inĩ ma nduma, rũciaro-inĩ rwa Daudi

jerusalem.name: Jerusalemu · Ũthamaki-Mũnyitithanie
jerusalem.note: Riri wa Isiraeli — na kĩĩranĩro kĩa mũthamaki wa tene na tene.
events: Saũli mũthamaki wa mbere, ningĩ Daudi na Goliathu
Kĩrĩkanĩro na Daudi — “gĩtĩ gĩaku gĩa ũthamaki nginya tene” (2 Sam. 7)
Suleimani aaka hekarũ kũu Jerusalemu

samaria.name: Samaria · Ũthamaki-Mũgayũkanu
samaria.note: Ũthamaki ũkĩgayũkana naguo ũgĩthegea o anabii makĩaya.
events: Thutha wa Suleimani, kũgayũkana harĩ Juda na Isiraeli
Ũhooi-mĩhianano ũcokaga na ũcokaga
Elija, Isaia, Jeremia makĩaya ‘cookai’ — na makĩratha ũhoro wa Mesia

nineveh.name: Nineve (Ashuri)
nineveh.note: Magĩte kũrũmbũiya mĩkaana yothe, mwena wa gathigathini ũkĩgũa wa mbere.
events: Nineve, itũũra inene rĩa Ashuri
Ũthamaki wa gathigathini ũkĩgũa harĩ Ashuri (722 M.K.)
Jona agĩtũmwo Nineve

babylon.name: Babuloni
babylon.note: Ũtukũ ũrĩa mũnene mũno — no kĩĩranĩro kĩa gũcokerio gĩgĩtigara.
events: Jerusalemu yagũa, hekarũ ĩgĩcina (586 M.K.)
Juda ĩgĩtwarũo Babuloni
Danieli na Ezekieli — wĩtĩkio na cioneki thĩinĩ wa gũtahwo

susa.name: Shushani (Perisia)
susa.note: O na ngoro-inĩ ya ũthamaki wa ahooi-mĩhianano, Ngai aamenyagĩrĩra andũ ake.
events: Perisia ĩgĩtooria Babuloni
Esiteri ahonokia Ayahudi kuuma kũniinwo
Nehemia ahooya mbere ya mũthamaki na agĩtũmwo

return.name: Gũcoka Jerusalemu
return.note: Macooka makĩaka rĩngĩ — no gũtirĩ mũthamaki ũkĩnyokire. Meeterera Mesia.
events: Ndũrĩ ithatũ macooka nĩ ũndũ wa watho wa Kuro (Zerubabeli 538 · Ezara 458 · Nehemia 444)
Hekarũ yaakwo rĩngĩ na thingo cia Jerusalemu igĩcookererio
Malaki — Kĩrĩkanĩro-Gĩkũrũ kĩrĩkagia: “Nĩngũtũma mũrekio wakwa”

bethlehem.name: Bethi-lehemu
bethlehem.note: Mesia ũrĩa weeranĩirwo nĩ ooka itũũra-inĩ rĩa Daudi — Ũhoro agĩtuĩka mũndũ.
events: Aaciarĩirũo Bethi-lehemu, itũũra rĩa Daudi
Araika makĩanĩrĩra ũhoro kũrĩ arĩithi
Andũ ogĩ a njata magĩũka kũmũinamĩrĩra

nazareth.name: Nazarethi
nazareth.note: Ngai agĩkũrĩra ta mũndũ itũũra-inĩ rĩa o ũguo.
events: Aarererio nyũmba ya mũbũndi wa mbaũ
Arĩ na mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ, akĩũria na agĩcookia hekarũ-inĩ
Thutha-inĩ akĩregwo thunagogi-inĩ ya itũũra rĩake

jordan.name: Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
jordan.note: Ũtungata wake wa kĩguũ ũkĩambĩrĩria — igũrũ rĩkĩmũimbũra arĩ Mũriũ.
events: Aabatithio nĩ Johana
Roho agĩikũrũka ta ndutura — “Ũyũ nĩ Mũrũ wakwa ũrĩa nyendete”
Aatooria magerio matatũ ma Shaitani werũ-inĩ

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Kĩama gĩake kĩa mbere kĩonanagia riri wake.
events: Mũgeni kĩhikanio-inĩ
Maaĩ magĩtuĩka ndibei — kĩama gĩake kĩa mbere
Arutwo ake makĩmwĩtĩkia

sychar.name: Sukaru (Samaria)
sychar.note: Njĩra ya ũtungata wa mbere — kũgerera Jerusalemu nginya Samaria ĩrĩa yamenagwo.
events: Aatheria hekarũ kũu Jerusalemu
Ũtukũ, Nikodemo — “No nginya ũciarũo rĩngĩ”
Maaĩ ma muoyo kũrĩ mũtumia wa Samaria

capernaum.name: Kaperinaumu
capernaum.today: hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia iria rĩa Galili ũmũthĩ
capernaum.note: Gĩtũ-inĩ kĩa ũtungata wa Galili — gwĩta, ũrutani na ũtharĩkanĩri ciothe icomanagĩra haha.
events: Eeta ategi a thamaki na agĩtua haha gĩtũ gĩake
Mũhunjia wa Kĩrĩma — “Kũrathimwo nĩ arĩa athĩĩni a roho”
Ngerekano cia ũthamaki — na ũtharĩkanĩri ũkĩaria

galilee.name: Iria rĩa Galili
galilee.note: Na hinya igũrũ rĩa ciũmbe nĩonanagia ũrĩa we arĩ.
events: “Kira, hoorera” — akĩhooreria kĩhuhũkanio
Aahũũnia andũ 5,000 na mĩgate ĩtano na thamaki igĩrĩ
Aathiĩra igũrũ rĩa maaĩ

caesarea_p.name: Kaisarea-kwa-Filipu
caesarea_p.note: Arutwo makĩmenya atĩ nĩ Kristo, naguo njĩra ya mũtharaba ĩkĩhingũka.
events: Kuumbũra kwa Petero — “Wee nĩwe Kristo, Mũrũ wa Ngai ũrĩa wĩ muoyo”
Akĩratha ũhoro wa gĩkuũ na kũriũka gwake rĩa mbere
Akĩgarũrwo riri-inĩ kĩrĩma-inĩ

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Njĩra-inĩ ya kwambata Jerusalemu, acaragia arĩa morĩte.
events: Aahe Baritimayo mũtumumu kũona
Eeta Zakayo mũtia wa mbeeca
“Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ookire gũcaria na kũhonokia arĩa morĩte”

bethany.name: Bethania
bethany.note: Nĩonanagia ũhoti igũrũ rĩa gĩkuũ kiumia kĩa mũthia kĩtanakinya.
events: Ariũkia Lazaro kuuma mbĩrĩra-inĩ — “Niĩ nĩ niĩ kũriũka na muoyo”
Mariamu amũitĩrĩria maguta ma gũthikwo
Kĩama gĩkĩ kĩoomia mũbango wa kũmũũraga

jerusalem.name: Jerusalemu
jerusalem.note: Gĩcukĩro kĩrĩa Bibilia yothe ĩrorete — mũtharaba, kũriũka, kwambata.
events: Gũtonya na riri; aagarũra metha cia hekarũ rĩngĩ
Iruga-inĩ rĩa mũthia aathambia arutwo nyarĩrĩ
Aakua mũtharaba-inĩ
Aariũka mũthenya wa gatatũ, agĩcooka akĩambata

antioch.name: Antiokia
antioch.note: Kanitha ũrĩa watũmaga, kũrĩa ũtũmwo wa Andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ wambĩrĩirie na ũgacokaga.
events: Thĩinĩ wa kũhooya Roho akĩamũra Baranaba na Saulu
Kanitha kũrĩa arĩa metĩkĩtie metirwo ‘Akristiano’ mbere
Handũ ha kwambĩrĩria mĩthiĩre ya 1, ya 2 na ya 3

seleucia.name: Seleukia
seleucia.note: Gĩthukĩ kĩa Antiokia — makĩhaica marikabu merekeire Kuporo.

salamis.name: Salamisi (Kuporo)
salamis.note: Rũgendo rwa mbere Kuporo — makĩhunjia thunagogi-inĩ.

paphos.name: Pafo
paphos.note: Hinya wonanagio harĩ arĩa marareganaga na Ũhoro-Ũrĩa-Mwega.
events: Elima mũrogi agĩthĩĩnio gũtua mũtumumu
Serugio Paulo barũthi agĩĩtĩkia
Kuuma haha ‘Paulo’ atongoria

perga.name: Periga
perga.note: Gĩthukĩ kĩa Pamfulia — haha Johana Mariko agĩcoka na thutha.

pantioch.name: Antiokia ya Pisidia
events: Mũhunjia mũraihu wa thoo wa ũhonokio thunagogi-inĩ
Andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ aingĩ magĩkena na makĩamũkĩra ũhoro
Maaingatwo nĩ ũtharĩkanĩri

iconium.name: Ikonio
iconium.note: Aingĩ magĩĩtĩkia, no kũnyariirwo gũkĩmaringĩrĩria mathiĩ na mbere.

lystra.name: Lusitera
lystra.note: Maagathĩrĩrio ta ngai, magĩcooka makĩhũũrwo na mahiga.
events: Ahonia mũndũ wonjete kuuma gũciarũo
Kĩrĩndĩ kĩgeria kũmarutĩra magongona ta ngai
Aahũũrwo na mahiga agĩtigwo ta mũkuũ, no agĩũkĩra

derbe.name: Deribe
derbe.note: Arutwo aingĩ matuĩkĩte; magĩcookera njĩra ya gwĩkĩra makanitha hinya.

troas.name: Teroa
troas.note: Handũ ha kũgarũrũka kũrĩa Ũhoro-Ũrĩa-Mwega werekeire Uropa rĩa mbere.
events: Kĩoneki kĩa mũndũ wa Makedonia
“Ũka mũrĩmo ũyũ ũtũteithie”
Makĩringa o rĩmwe magĩthiĩ Uropa

philippi.name: Filipi
philippi.note: Kanitha wa mbere wa Uropa — Ũhoro-Ũrĩa-Mwega ũgĩtooria o na njeera-inĩ.
events: Lidia, mwonjorithia wa nguo cia rangi wa ndathi, agĩĩtĩkia
Mũirĩtu ngombo mũragũri akĩohorũo
Nyĩmbo cia ũtukũ gatagatĩ, gĩthingithia, nyũmba ya mũrangĩri wa njeera ĩkĩhonokio

thess.name: Thesalonike
thess.note: Ũhoro ũgĩthingithia itũũra naguo ũtharĩkanĩri ũkĩiyũra.
events: Aaria thunagogi-inĩ thabatũ ithatũ
“Aya nĩo magarũranĩte thĩ”
Makĩũra ũtukũ

berea.name: Beroia
berea.note: Arĩa ‘a gĩtĩĩo’ arĩa maatuĩririe ũhoro o ene.
events: Maamũkĩra ũhoro na kĩyo
O mũthenya matuĩragia Maandĩko kũrora kana nĩ ma
Aingĩ magĩĩtĩkia

athens.name: Athene
athens.note: Itũũra-inĩ rĩa a-ũũgĩ ahunjagia ‘ngai ũrĩa ũtoĩkaine’.
events: Aathĩĩnĩka nĩ itũũra rĩiyũrĩte mĩhianano
Areopago-inĩ ahunjia Mũũmbi na kũriũka
Aanyararwo, no andũ anini magĩĩtĩkia

corinth.name: Korintho
corinth.note: Aikara mwaka na nuthu, akĩhaanda kanitha itũũra-inĩ rĩa waganu.
events: Aathondeka hema na Akula na Pirisila
“Ndũgetigĩre… nĩ ũndũ ndĩ hamwe nawe”
Akorintho aingĩ magĩĩtĩkia na makĩbatithio

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Ngoro ya mũthiĩre wa gatatũ — ũhoro ũgĩtherema Asia yothe.
events: Ũrutani wa o mũthenya mĩaka ĩĩrĩ nyũmba-inĩ ya Turano
Mabuku ma ũrogi magĩcinwo; mawĩra ma hinya
Demeterio mũturi wa betha akĩarahũra ngũĩ

miletus.name: Mileto
miletus.note: Kĩagano kĩa maithori na athuri a Efeso.
events: “Mũrĩithagie kanitha ũrĩa aagũrire na thakame yake mwene”
Athuri makĩrĩra, makĩmenya matikamuona rĩngĩ

caesarea.name: Kaisarea
caesarea.note: Mĩaka ĩĩrĩ aciirĩrĩra Ũhoro-Ũrĩa-Mwega mbere ya abarũthi na mũthamaki.
events: Ciira mbere ya abarũthi Felike na Fesito
Wĩciirĩri wake mbere ya Mũthamaki Agiripa
“Ndaciirio nĩ Kaisari” — agĩthiĩ Roma

jerusalem.name: Jerusalemu
jerusalem.note: Aanyitwo hekarũ-inĩ, naguo rũgendo rwake arĩ mũohwo rũkĩambĩrĩria.
events: Aanyitwo nĩ kĩrĩndĩ hekarũ-inĩ
Eeciirĩrĩra mbere ya kĩama
Arĩ mũtũũri wa Roma, agĩtũmwo arangĩirwo nginya Kaisarea

myra.name: Mura
myra.note: Makĩhaicio marikabu ya Alekisanderia ĩrĩa yathiaga Roma.

fairhaven.name: Bandari Nzuri (Kirete)
fairhaven.note: Mũkaana wa Paulo wa kũrũgama gũtwarũo nĩ marikabu ndwarũmbũirwo.

crete.name: Kirete
crete.note: Thutha wa kuohorũo, gĩcuthĩ kũrĩa aatigire Tito atabarĩre makanitha.
events: Aatiga Tito athurage athuri o itũũra-inĩ
Eeta atongoria atarĩ na ũcuuke, ehokeku
Aaandĩka marũa kũrĩ Tito

malta.name: Melita
malta.note: Kũgerera kĩhuhũkanio na kũũrwo nĩ marikabu, kĩĩranĩro kĩa Ngai gĩkĩrũgama.
events: Rũhuho rwa ‘gathigathini-irathĩro’ rũkiunanga marikabu, no andũ othe 276 makĩhonoka
Arũmwo nĩ nyoka, no ndaiguire ũũru
Aahonia arũaru a gĩcuthĩ kĩu

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Makinya Itali na magĩtũnganwo nĩ ariũ a Ithe witũ.

rome.name: Roma
rome.note: Ũhoro-Ũrĩa-Mwega ũgĩkinya ngoro ya ũthamaki mũthia-inĩ — ti mũthia no nĩ kĩambĩrĩria.
events: Mĩaka ĩĩrĩ aikarĩte mũciĩ arĩ mũrangĩre, akĩhunjia ũthamaki na ũcamba
Kuuma haha aandĩka Marũa ma Njeera (Aef·Afil·Akol·Filemoni)
Thutha-inĩ aanyitwo rĩngĩ, akĩandĩka 2 Timotheo na akĩũragwo — “Nĩndahũũranĩte mbaara ĩrĩa njega, nĩndarĩkĩtie ihenya”

journeys.j5: Mũthiĩre wa gatano · thutha wa kuohorũo
